programme.desc: Tiger explains that the key to hitting good shots out of the rough is being able to read the lie. Is it a flier? Which way is the grass growing? Can you get the club on the ball? These and other nuances determine the shot you play.

programme.desc: Serving as the centerpiece for Ducati’s 100th anniversary celebrations, the Race of Champions features stars from the MotoGP and WorldSBK grids racing for bragging rights as the fastest Ducati rider.

programme.title: My Game: Tiger Woods Season
programme.desc: As much as Tiger Woods has thrilled fans with his power and clutch putting, it’s his wedge game that has undergone the biggest transformation. In this episode, Tiger shares his secrets so you can learn to stick it close inside 100 yards.

programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When his wife and child are in danger, a young prince from the Draculea dynasty makes a dark sacrifice to save them. He becomes the first vampire and the man who inspires the legend of Dracula.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a U.S. Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for Weapons of Mass Destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex con is out to avenge the murder of his brother during a botched robbery, but the circumstances of the actual killing become muddled and the killer obscure.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk's out to emulate his father's deeds. Spock keeps him in check as an evil Romulan creates black holes to destroy the Federation. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: Hunting a terrorist who has destroyed most of the fleet, the crew of the Enterprise must take a leap into unknown territory where loyalties will be tested and ultimate sacrifices made.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Two years after saving the world, Sam Witwicky returns to university as the Autobots and humans work together to stop a returning Decepticon threat, while pressure builds to remove the robots from Earth.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves attempt to reclaim their stolen gold and avenge their mentor's death by creating the largest ever traffic jam in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In futuristic Toronto a repo man pursues customers that can no longer pay for their implanted organs.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: In the Far East, Alex O'Connell, the son of famed mummy fighters Rick and Evy O'Connell, unearths the mummy of the first Emperor of Qin - a shape-shifting entity cursed by a witch centuries ago.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: After a cop is murdered by his partner, he ends up in the afterlife, where he joins a special police force protecting the living from souls that refuse to leave. He teams up with a former Old West sheriff to stop his partner from destroying the world.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of death-defying adrenaline junkies on a mission to kick some ass.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as a hitman whose latest mission puts him on a bullet train travelling from Tokyo to Morioka, alongside deadly adversaries from around the world. The question is: who will make it off the train alive at the final station?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Snow White And The Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: After a devastating betrayal, kind-hearted Queen Freya unleashes dark powers and wages war on love, claiming warriors Eric and Sara as victims.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports has grown into reality TV bloodlust, Jason Statham stars as a speedway champion ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive, or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A former hostage rescue commander and army veteran now works in skyscraper security. While based in Hong Kong, he is blamed for a fire in the world’s tallest tower and must clear his name.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they’re left stranded on a raft, 160 km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego "Venom" to save his life.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: The wealthy live in luxury on a space station while the rest fight for scraps on a ruined Earth. Then one man is given an opportunity to even the score.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history. Dan Brown's bestselling novel is thrillingly directed by Ron Howard.

programme.title: Dead Again In Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story: a group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream, get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: True account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The mummified body of Imhotep is shipped to a museum in London, where he once again wakes and begins his campaign of rage and terror.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighbourhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an elderly woman is murdered, the CSIs look to the neighbour and nephew as possible suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of two identical twins within a two hour time frame, on opposite sides of town.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The Cadillac of an infamous 1970s mob boss, Mickey Dunn, is found in a lake after he disappeared years ago.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine and Brass find a man trapped in cement near a murder victim at a construction site. However, after being rescued and ruled a suspect, the man refuses to reveal his identity.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine testifies in a murder trial in which a man is accused of murdering his own mother three years ago, but the suspect is found not guilty.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine investigates the murder of a runaway teen whose naked body is found in a desert lot behind a hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an unidentified woman is found dead on the set of the famous show Ka by Cirque Du Soleil, the CSI must study the inner workings of the show to find out what happened.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The deceased victims in the CSI coroner's office give voice to their own murder investigations for the first time.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of brutal beatings that take place within the span of a few hours throughout the city, all done by a bizarre group of hooded people with strange physical features.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the case of a woman found dead in a church.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Keppler investigate the possible selling of body parts on the Black Market after they find a charred body of an ex-con in a welding shack with several body parts removed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Keppler finds himself having recurring nightmares about an incident many years ago in New Jersey, which get worse when a friend of his comes to town.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is shocked when he opens a package sent to him while he was on sabbatical and finds a miniature crime scene inside.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team are discouraged when they find a pool of blood as they begin investigating the disappearance of a high school basketball star and his cheerleader girlfriend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Six showgirls are murdered in their rented house and Sara is haunted by the dying words of the last victim, as she dies in Sara's arms.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a thug gunned down in a limo, the CSI team discovers that the case has ties to the brother of the man Greg killed in self-defense.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom sends the team out with new cases and goes to spend the evening in autopsy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In their attempt to identify the murderer of a has-been boxer who lived among a group of prostitutes who detested him, the team must establish what actually killed him.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: During a shootout with the police, a suspect in the kidnapping and possible murder of a blackjack dealer and her husband takes his own life.

programme.desc: Nick and Catherine investigate why a woman who was about to be married would have taken a swan dive off of her balcony. Also, Grissom investigates the brutal murder of a woman found in an alley.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a woman found in the park posed to recreate life and a string of murders follows with the same pattern.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: It is Halloween and Nick and Riley witness a man dressed as a cop rob a convenience store and then must help the team investigate the death of the daughter of a major drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man's body is found in the desert and his girlfriend is missing. After finding needle marks on the victim, Grissom asks Lady Heather for help as he believes the markings are a form of S&M.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a shooting at a Koreatown neighbourhood party, in which the mother and uncle of a small boy, Park Bang, are murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Greg, Riley, and Brass investigate the death of a woman and the beating of her daughter who falls into a coma.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs discover a link between the death of a popular young singer and a murder that happened over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr Raymond Langston.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team works to close Grissom's last open case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Dr Langston's first day as a CSI is anything but easy when a seemingly simple burglary case ends up overlapping with an in-depth homicide and arson case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when an undercover FBI agent is found brutally murdered. The CSIs must help the victim's partner find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: CSI Warrick Brown is shot and killed outside a Las Vegas diner. The entire team grieves for their fallen friend, while unknown to them, the killer is one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Catherine investigate why a woman who was about to be married would have taken a swan dive off of her balcony. Also, Grissom investigates the brutal murder of a woman found in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston, Nick and Riley investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant, which turns out to be difficult because most of their evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night which are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: We follow the happenings of a seedy motel's inhabitants over the course of a year.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in a usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, socially awkward Iona and her cat-obsessed mother Lyn move to a new town. Together the pair put on a brave face, finding and creating comfort as one another’s sole friend. However, life begins to get tricky after the town’s small-minded denizens reveal themselves to be as petty and cruel as those from the town they just fled. At school, Iona finds herself targeted by a trio of mean girls who exploit her naïveté. Across town, Lyn attempts to make friends and is flatly rejected by a knitting circle of mean women who find her very existence repugnant. Daughter and mother find refuge in an elaborate fantasy world founded on denial and delusion; ultimately distance between them just when they need each other most.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: Sci-fi romance starring Alex Sharp and Elle Fanning. It's 1977 and, in Croydon, a teenage punk schoolboy encounters a beautiful young woman from outer space. Strong language.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: Based on the 1998 book `The Surgeon of Crowthorne' by Simon Winchester, the life of Professor James Murray is portrayed as he begins work on compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid-19th century. As he led the overseeing committee, the professor received over 10,000 entries from one source in particular - a patient at Broadmoor Criminal Lunatic Asylum, Dr William Minor.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: 1920s London, English writer, Virginia Woolf (Elizabeth Debicki), has reached the apex of modern world literature with her landmark novel, 'Mrs. Dalloway', but nothing seems to soothe the darkness that plagues her. Poems and letters of admiration from Vita Sackville-West (Gemma Arterton) lead to a courtship that is hardly concealed from the outside world. Soon, Virginia is enthralled by Vita. She is everything Virginia is not –extroverted, direct, in possession of a strongly magnetic personality and, as Virginia notes, a pair of the most "amazing legs". Focusing on the period 1927-1928 during which time Woolf wrote 'Orlando', the novel their relationship inspired, Vita & Virginia is a moving and exhilarating feature from actor and writer Dame Eileen Atkins.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: In a cheap Parisian hotel, Oscar Wilde lies on his death bed and recalls his past with wit and irony. Was he once the most famous man in London? He reviews the failed attempt to reconcile with his long-suffering wife, the ensuing reprisal of his fatal love affair with Lord Alfred Douglas and the devotion of Robbie Ross, who tried and failed to save him from himself.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Tell It To The Bees
programme.desc: Dr. Jean Markham returns to the town she left as a teenager to take over her late father's medical practice. When a school-yard scuffle lands Charlie in her surgery, she invites him to visit the hives in her garden and tell his secrets to the bees, as she once did. The new friendship between the boy and the bee keeper brings his mother Lydia into Jean's world.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: I, Daniel Blake
programme.desc: This gripping, moving tale goes about the journey of a 59 year-old widowed carpenter, recovering from a heart attack who befriends a single mother and her two kids as they navigate their way through their difficult lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, reclusive writer Alice has her sequestered life upended when Frank, an evacuee from the London Blitz, is left in her care.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Academy Award-nominee Bill Murray) and his wife Eleanor (Olivia Williams) host the King and Queen of England (Samuel West, Olivia Colman) for a weekend at their upstate New York vacation home. With Britain facing imminent war with Germany, the Windsors are desperately looking to FDR for support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as wife, mother and mistresses all conspire to make the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Also starring Academy Award-nominee Laura Linney.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. Comedy drama, starring Jim Broadbent and Helen Mirren. The final film from Notting Hill director Roger Michell.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Tarrac
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home on Ireland's south-west coast to help her father recover from a heart attack. Day to day they get along just fine, but so much that has been left unsaid about the loss of her mother. Before long, she finds herself returning to the competitive world of rowing in Naomhógs, native Irish boats. Contemporary drama, starring Kelly Gough, Lorcan Cranitch, Kate Nic Chonaonaigh, Kate Finegan, Rachel Feeney and Cillian Ó Gairbhí. In Gaelic

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: Following the armed seizure of the Iranian Embassy in London in April 1980, six tense days unfold as negotiations fail and fear grips the city. Inside, hostages endure uncertainty while outside, elite SAS commandos meticulously plan a daring rescue mission. The operation, executed with precision and bravery, becomes a defining moment in British military history, showcasing courage, discipline, and the power of swift, decisive action under extreme pressure.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Urban Hymn
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the 2011 British summer riots, Michael Caton-Jones' URBAN HYMN is a redemptive coming-of-age story following wayward teen, Jamie (Letitia Wright). Encouraged by inspiring and unconventional care worker Kate (Shirley Henderson) to use singing as a release from her troubled life, Jamie's loyalties soon become torn between Kate and her possessive and volatile best friend, Leanne (Isabella Laughland).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: I Am Slave reveals the shocking truth that if you're living in London today, you could be living next door to a slave. Having been kidnapped as a child and taken away from the Nuba Mountains in Sudan, young Malia finds herself being sent to London as a teenager, and made to work with no wages and no freedom in a house where they control her every move.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: A romantic drama following Sabine (Academy Award®-winner Kate Winslet), a strong-willed and talented landscape designer, who is chosen to build one of the main gardens at King Louis XIV's new palace at Versailles. In her new position of power, she challenges gender and class barriers while also becoming professionally and romantically entangled with the court's renowned landscape artist André Le Notre (Matthias Schoenaerts).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Frank is a hard-working 55 year-old, respected in his local community, who suddenly finds himself without a job. For the first time in his life, Frank is without direction. When his friend Danny jokes that on a clear day he could swim to France, an idea is planted in Frank’s mind. Concealing his plans from his loving wife Joan Frank is determined to put his life back together by attempting the ultimate test of endurance – to swim the English Channel. In doing so he cements a broken relationship with his grown-up son.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Interlude in Prague
programme.desc: A powerful period thriller, starring James Purefoy (High-Rise), Samantha Barks (Les Misérables) and Aneurin Barnard (Dunkirk).1788, Mozart escapes Vienna to spend time in Prague. His presence unleashes a series of dramatic events set off by a forbidden affair with soprano Zuzana. A provocative twist on the Mozart biopic, with love, lust, murder and "Don Giovanni" - not your average costume drama!
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Combining classic fairytales with the wild world of Amsterdam, this riotous Lennox Brother's fantasy comedy is a coming of age story not for the faint hearted. Jack arrives in Amsterdam to find his father and through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad: Battle for Blood
programme.desc: It's 1216, just one year after the battle at Rochester Castle, and a new enemy threatens English - bands of Celtic raiders. After the death of his father at the hands of these raiders, Hubert is determined to defeat them, once and for all.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Two miles west of London, Dr. Robert Laing moves into his new apartment seeking soulless anonymity, only to find that the building's residents have no intention of leaving him alone. Resigned to the complex social dynamics unfolding around him, Laing bites the bullet and becomes neighbourly. As he struggles to establish his position, Laing's good manners and sanity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Frank is a hard-working 55 year-old, respected in his local community, who suddenly finds himself without a job. For the first time in his life, Frank is without direction. When his friend Danny jokes that on a clear day he could swim to France, an idea is planted in Frank’s mind. Concealing his plans from his loving wife Joan Frank is determined to put his life back together by attempting the ultimate test of endurance – to swim the English Channel. In doing so he cements a broken relationship with his grown-up son.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Rubika Shah’s energising film charts a vital national protest movement. Rock Against Racism (RAR) was formed in 1976, prompted by ‘music’s biggest colonialist’ Eric Clapton and his support of racist MP Enoch Powell. White Riot blends fresh interviews with queasy archive footage to recreate a hostile environment of anti-immigrant hysteria and National Front marches. As neo-Nazis recruited the nation’s youth, RAR’s multicultural punk and reggae gigs provided rallying points for resistance. As founder Red Saunders explains: ‘We peeled away the Union Jack to reveal the swastika’. The campaign grew from Hoxton fanzine roots to 1978’s huge antifascist carnival in Victoria Park, featuring X-Ray Spex, Steel Pulse and of course The Clash, whose rock star charisma and gale-force conviction took RAR’s message to the masses.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Interlude in Prague
programme.desc: A powerful period thriller, starring James Purefoy (High-Rise), Samantha Barks (Les Misérables) and Aneurin Barnard (Dunkirk).1788, Mozart escapes Vienna to spend time in Prague. His presence unleashes a series of dramatic events set off by a forbidden affair with soprano Zuzana. A provocative twist on the Mozart biopic, with love, lust, murder and "Don Giovanni" - not your average costume drama!
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: On a crisp December morning in 1932, bride-to-be Dolly hides in her bedroom as her many family members arrive for the wedding with all the cheerfulness, chaos and grievances that go with such occasions. But trouble soon appears with the arrival of Joseph, Dolly’s lover from the previous summer, who, to her mother’s exasperation, throws Dolly’s feelings into turmoil.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad: Battle for Blood
programme.desc: It's 1216, just one year after the battle at Rochester Castle, and a new enemy threatens English - bands of Celtic raiders. After the death of his father at the hands of these raiders, Hubert is determined to defeat them, once and for all.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Adapted by Ian McEwan from his bestselling novel, the drama centers on a young couple of drastically different backgrounds in the summer of 1962. Following the pair through their idyllic courtship, this movie explores sex and the societal pressure that can accompany physical intimacy, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: How did an ordinary, middle-aged couple become a symbol of defiance against Nazi brutality? This true-life tale of courage unfolds against the tumultuous backdrop of Berlin in 1940. Otto and Anna Quangel (Brendan Gleeson & Emma Thompson) are a working class husband and wife doing their best to ride out the war. When their son is killed fighting on the frontlines, however, everything changes. They begin pouring their rage and grief into postcards emblazoned with anti-Nazi slogans, risking everything to disseminate their messages of protest across the city. But this seemingly small act of subversion rattles the regime, including a police inspector (Daniel Brühl) who will not rest until the culprits have been caught. Based on the bestselling novel Every Man Dies Alone by Hans Fallada, Alone in Berlin is both a gripping thriller and a stirring ode to resistance.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mad About the Boy: The Noël Coward Story
programme.desc: The extraordinary life of playwright, singer, actor, composer, and director Noël Coward, who rose from poverty to stardom while keeping his sexuality a secret. Featuring Laurence Olivier, Maggie Smith, Frank Sinatra, Michael Caine and Lucille Ball. Narrated by Alan Cumming. With Rupert Everett as the voice of Noël Coward. Directed by Academy Award Nominee Barnaby Thompson.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: A Promise
programme.desc: Set against the outbreak of World War I, 'A Promise' centres on Lotte Hoffmeister (Rebecca Hall of 'The Awakening') a married woman who falls in love with her husband’s protégé, Friedrich Zeitz (Richard Madden of 'Game of Thrones'). Bound by duty and divided by the impending war, the young lovers pledge their devotion to each other in spite of what their future holds. Adapted from Stefan Zweig’s novel 'Journey into the Past' and directed by Patrice Leconte ('The Girl on the Bridge', 'Man on the Train'), 'A Promise' is a passionate and romantic drama about forbidden love.

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: From acclaimed Director Peter Mullan comes NEDS, the story of a young man’s journey from prize winning schoolboy to knife carrying teenager. John McGill (an amazing performance from newcomer Conor McCarron) struggles with the low expectations of those around him and events take a maddening turn as he descends into shocking violence on a seemingly one man mission of self destruction.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: A Promise
programme.desc: Set against the outbreak of World War I, 'A Promise' centres on Lotte Hoffmeister (Rebecca Hall of 'The Awakening') a married woman who falls in love with her husband’s protégé, Friedrich Zeitz (Richard Madden of 'Game of Thrones'). Bound by duty and divided by the impending war, the young lovers pledge their devotion to each other in spite of what their future holds. Adapted from Stefan Zweig’s novel 'Journey into the Past' and directed by Patrice Leconte ('The Girl on the Bridge', 'Man on the Train'), 'A Promise' is a passionate and romantic drama about forbidden love.

programme.title: The Gospel of Us
programme.desc: This project is the film version of the Passion play that was performed throughout Port Talbot in Easter 2011.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom. Through Lady Rose's 'scripture', a life of extraordinary love and great injustice emerges, revealing a remarkable young woman of courage, whose only crime was to fall in love.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice, a sleep doctor haunted by the mysterious death of her younger brother, must abandon all her rational scientific reasoning when she comes across a family terrorized by a demon that feeds on its victims by paralyzing them while they sleep. In order to defeat the dark spirit who was also responsible for her brother’s death, Alice must journey into her own nightmares.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: To Olivia
programme.desc: In 1962, writer Roald Dahl and his movie star wife Patricia Neal have retreated to the English countryside to bring up their young family. Tragically, their lives are turned upside down by the death of their daughter, Olivia. As the couple struggle through the loss, their grief becomes a source of redemption and strength which changes their destiny.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.desc: How bad can a second date be? United by a love for Meryl Streep and hopeless relationships, one pair are about to find out. Comedy with Alexandra Roach and George MacKay.
